headline: ₹500-2,000 Cr at risk if regulatory or reputational risks crystallize — Adani Power to receive ₹12,500 Cr from Assam for unutilized power, raising ESG and regulatory scrutiny
what_matters: BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, TCFD triggered; risk of SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions if non-disclosure persists.
Short-term cash flow boost; risk of P/E compression (5-10%) if ESG ratings fall or regulatory scrutiny intensifies.
Possible increase in cost of capital (20-40bps) if disclosure is inadequate; risk of FII outflow.
